betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Turbofan§f

§aA jet engine power generator that burns kerosene or jet fuel for massive HE output!§f

§bThe Turbofan§f is a power generator available after the first tier of oil processing. It resembles an RR Trent-900 turbofan engine. It burns aviation-grade fuels — §bKerosene§f and §bJet Fuel§f — for substantial power production.

§6Crafting§f (§bAssembly Factory§f):
§b• 8×§f Titanium Shell
§b• 4×§f High-Speed Steel Pipe
§b• 12×§f Bakelite Bar
§b• 1×§f Reinforced Turbofan Blade
§b• 12×§f Dense Gold Wire
§b• 3×§f Integrated Circuit Board

§6Power Output§f:

| Upgrade | Consumption | Kerosene | Jet Fuel |
|---------|-------------|----------|----------|
| 0 | 20 mB/s | 77 kHE/s | 192 kHE/s |
| 1 | 40 mB/s | 205 kHE/s | 512 kHE/s |
| 2 | 60 mB/s | 385 kHE/s | 960 kHE/s |
| 3 | 80 mB/s | 616 kHE/s | 1,540 kHE/s |

§7• Cartoon Pony painting: 2,020 mB/s, 20,000 kHE/s (both fuels)§f

§6Function§f: Kills entities in front by sucking them in; burns entities behind with afterburners.
§6Bonus§f: Collects §e1,000 mB§f of blood per entity killed by the fan blades.

§eTip§f: Jet Fuel is significantly more efficient than Kerosene. Upgrade the afterburner to level 3 for maximum power density. For absurd power, the Cartoon Pony painting produces 20 GHE/s but consumes 2 buckets per tick!
